subcodes.first_line: O blessed leaf! The flame of thy yearning hath blazed forth and shed its radiance, and its warmth hath touched the heart of 'Abdu'l-Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مبارکه آتش اشتیاقت شعله و اشراق نموده و حرارتش بقلب عبدالبهاء تاثیر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @wisdom [hikmat]
